info.title: Rippling Platform API
info.description: Rippling's base platform API for managing employees, companies, departments, teams, groups, leave management, custom fields, work locations, levels, and other HR/workforce resources.

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user based on the access token provided.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing access token

get.description: Returns a list of companies accessible to the authenticated user or application.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

get.description: Returns a list of active employees for the company. Use the include_terminated endpoint to also retrieve terminated employees.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

get.description: Returns the details of a specific employee by their unique identifier.

parameters.name: employeeId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the employee

get.description: Returns a list of all employees including those who have been terminated.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

200.description: List of all employees including terminated

get.description: Returns a list of all departments in the company.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

get.description: Returns a list of all teams in the company.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

get.description: Returns a list of all employee levels defined in the company.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

get.description: Returns a list of all work locations configured in the company.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

get.description: Returns a list of all custom field definitions configured for the company.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

get.description: Returns a list of all groups in the company.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

post.description: Creates a new group in the company.

get.description: Returns the details of a specific group by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the group

put.description: Replaces all properties of a group with the provided values.

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the group

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the group

delete.description: Deletes a group by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the group

get.description: Returns a list of activity events for the company, such as employee onboarding, role changes, and terminations.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date-time to filter events occurring after this timestamp

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date-time to filter events occurring before this timestamp

get.description: Returns a list of leave requests for the company.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

parameters.name: employeeId
parameters.description: Filter leave requests by employee ID

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter leave requests by status

post.description: Creates a new leave request for an employee.

patch.description: Partially updates an existing leave request.

parameters.name: leaveRequestId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the leave request

parameters.name: leaveRequestId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the leave request

post.description: Processes (approves or denies) a pending leave request.

parameters.name: leaveRequestId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the leave request

get.description: Returns leave balances for all employees or filtered by employee.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

parameters.name: employeeId
parameters.description: Filter leave balances by employee ID

get.summary: Get leave balance for a specific employee
get.description: Returns the leave balance for a specific employee.

parameters.name: employeeId
parameters.description: The employee ID to retrieve the leave balance for

get.description: Returns a list of all leave types configured for the company.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

get.description: Returns the SAML Identity Provider metadata XML for configuring single sign-on.

get.summary: Get matching users for an app
get.description: Returns a list of users that match for a given application integration, used for user provisioning and account matching.

parameters.name: app
parameters.description: The application identifier

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

200.description: List of matching users for the app

post.description: Marks an application as installed for the company, completing the installation flow.

post.summary: Push a candidate to the ATS
post.description: Pushes a new candidate into the Rippling Applicant Tracking System.

bearerAuth.description: OAuth 2.0 Bearer token. Obtain an access token through the Rippling OAuth 2.0 authorization flow.

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response returned by the API

id.description: Unique identifier of the authenticated user

email.description: Email address of the authenticated user

name.description: Full name of the authenticated user

role.description: Role of the authenticated user in the company

companyId.description: The company ID the user belongs to

employeeId.description: The employee ID associated with the user

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the company was created

Employee.description: Represents an employee in the company

department.description: Department ID the employee belongs to

team.description: Team ID the employee belongs to

workLocation.description: Work location ID of the employee

ssn.description: Last four digits of Social Security Number

companyId.description: Company ID the employee belongs to

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the employee record was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the employee record was last updated

Department.description: Represents a department in the company

parentId.description: ID of the parent department, if applicable

employeeCount.description: Number of employees in the department

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the department was created

Team.description: Represents a team in the company

parentId.description: ID of the parent team, if applicable

memberCount.description: Number of members in the team

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the team was created

Level.description: Represents an employee level in the company hierarchy

rank.description: Numeric rank of the level in the hierarchy

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the level was created

Group.description: Represents a custom group of employees

memberIds.description: List of employee IDs that are members of this group

memberCount.description: Number of members in the group

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the group was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the group was last updated

GroupCreatePayload.description: Payload for creating a new group

memberIds.description: List of employee IDs to add as members
Updated list of employee IDs as members

id.description: Unique identifier of the work location

isRemote.description: Whether this is a remote work location

isHeadquarters.description: Whether this is the company headquarters

employeeCount.description: Number of employees at this location

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the work location was created

CustomFields.description: A map of custom field keys to their values for an employee

CustomFieldMeta.description: Metadata about a custom field definition

id.description: Unique identifier of the custom field

name.description: Display name of the custom field

key.description: Programmatic key for the custom field

type.description: Data type of the custom field

options.description: Available options for SELECT and MULTI_SELECT field types

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the custom field was created

LeaveRequest.description: Represents a leave request by an employee

id.description: Unique identifier of the leave request

employeeId.description: ID of the employee who submitted the request

status.description: Current status of the leave request

totalDays.description: Total number of leave days requested

reason.description: Reason provided for the leave request

reviewerId.description: ID of the employee who reviewed the request

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the leave request was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the leave request was last updated

LeaveRequestCreatePayload.description: Payload for creating a new leave request

employeeId.description: ID of the employee requesting leave

LeaveRequestUpdatePayload.description: Payload for updating an existing leave request

startDate.description: Updated start date of the leave

endDate.description: Updated end date of the leave

startTime.description: Updated start time for partial-day leaves

endTime.description: Updated end time for partial-day leaves

reason.description: Updated reason for the leave request

LeaveRequestProcessPayload.description: Payload for processing (approving or denying) a leave request

action.description: The action to take on the leave request

LeaveBalance.description: Represents a leave balance for an employee

carryOver.description: Number of days carried over from the previous period

periodStart.description: Start date of the current accrual period

periodEnd.description: End date of the current accrual period

CompanyLeaveType.description: Represents a leave type configured for the company

id.description: Unique identifier of the leave type

isPaid.description: Whether the leave type is paid

maxDays.description: Maximum number of days allowed per period

requiresApproval.description: Whether leave requests of this type require approval

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the leave type was created

employeeId.description: ID of the employee associated with the event

actorId.description: ID of the user who triggered the event

metadata.description: Additional metadata associated with the event

Entities.description: Represents an entity matched for app user provisioning

appUserId.description: The user's ID in the external application

Candidate.description: Represents a candidate in the Applicant Tracking System

jobId.description: ID of the job the candidate is applying for

jobTitle.description: Title of the job the candidate is applying for

stage.description: Current stage in the hiring pipeline

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the candidate was created

MarkAppInstalledPayload.description: Payload for marking an app as installed

appId.description: The unique identifier of the application to mark as installed

tags.name: Leave Management
tags.description: Manage leave requests, balances, and leave types

tags.name: App Management
tags.description: Manage application installations and user matching
